items.reason: The PR documents deploying generated metastore_head_nodes with dscli up, but cli/up.py only reads single metastore_head_node and never starts multiple Metastore heads.
The new HA Metastore section says every metastore_head_nodes entry starts Metastore service, but the implementation only toggles start_metastore_service for one metastore_head_node.
The runtime context records dscli metastore_ha as a high-availability multi-head flow without noting that dscli up and runtime config still support only one Metastore head.
